name: the toolchain installer --verify reports per-tool status and a summary without installing
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/install-toolchain.sh" --verify 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'toolchain present=' e.txt && ! grep -q 'status=installed' e.txt && echo verify-ok 1>&2
